## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Spec text update
- [ ] Schema update
- [ ] Fixture update
- [ ] Tooling/docs update

## Normative Status

- [ ] Normative change
- [ ] Non-normative change

## Validation

Commands run and outcomes:

```text
# e.g. node tools/run-oci1-conformance-fixtures.mjs
```

## Compatibility Impact

- [ ] No compatibility impact
- [ ] Backward-compatible
- [ ] Potentially breaking (explain)

## Checklist

- [ ] Docs updated where needed
- [ ] Fixtures updated where needed
- [ ] No private/internal artifacts included
- [ ] I reviewed `CONTRIBUTING.md`
